# Team context

Shared context for ALL tickets — every agent reads this before working on any task.
Facts that span tickets belong here: environment quirks, team decisions, access notes,
recurring gotchas. Ticket-specific details belong in that ticket's own context.md.

Humans edit freely. Agents: only the Context Getter may append here, only when
explicitly asked ("add this to team context"), as dated blocks under Shared notes.
Never credentials, tokens, or personal data.

## Facts

- (example) Deploys to test env happen Tuesdays; book QA before Monday noon.

## Shared notes

### 2026-01-01 — example (delete me)
Blocks look like this: dated, sourced, one topic per block.
